中文 GitHub ↗
Native analytics for serious AI workflows

See every Token , quota window, and session arc from your menu bar.

Claude Statistics turns local AI coding history into a polished macOS command center for Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI.

usage · preview

3
AI coding providers in one app
53-week
heatmap and all-time trends
Local
parsing, search, and cost analysis
9 + 11
share roles and unlockable badges
Provider-aware by design

Claude, Codex, Gemini — each parses, meters, and switches identity independently.

Claude Statistics can keep managed accounts for Claude, Codex, and Gemini, then switch the live account used by that provider when you choose another identity.

C

Claude Code

Anthropic · OAuth

Parses JSONL transcripts. Fetches 5h / 7d / per-model usage windows from Anthropic's OAuth API.

5h / 7d / model windows
Parsing + quota
5h window · 7d window · per-model
Windows / groups
5h window7d windowper-model
X

Codex CLI

OpenAI · JWT

Decodes the local JWT for user info — no extra API call. Handles the CLI's WAL/SHM sidecar files cleanly.

Local JWT + WAL recovery
Identity + scanning
WAL recovery · live watch · local JWT
Windows / groups
WAL recoverylive watchlocal JWT
G

Gemini CLI

Google · grouped

Grouped quota buckets visualized, with local trend charts anchored to reset times.

Pro / Flash / Flash Lite
Quota groups
Pro · Flash · Flash Lite
Windows / groups
ProFlashFlash Lite
Why it feels different

A native-feeling command center with the visual confidence of a modern product site.

Session intelligence

Search transcripts, inspect tools, and jump back into the exact project context.

Browse grouped sessions, inspect token and model breakdowns, and reopen work in your preferred terminal.

typescript config 7 results
~/dev/claude-stats · 4 matches 12m ago
~/work/pricing · 2 matches 2h ago
~/spike/fiber · 1 matches 1d ago
Usage visibility

Track live quota pressure before a workflow stalls.

Follow 5-hour and 7-day Claude windows, Gemini grouped buckets, and menu bar status at a glance.

Claude · 78% · 3:42 left
All-time analytics

See the shape of your work over weeks, months, and bursts.

Heatmaps, project rankings, trend charts, and cost distribution turn raw transcripts into signal.

Provider-aware design

Claude, Codex, and Gemini each keep their own parsing and account model.

Provider switching feels instant without stopping background indexing for the others.

Account switching

Swap live Claude, Codex, or Gemini identities without digging through dotfiles.

Changing CLI identity becomes a product feature, not a shell ritual.

Share cards

Turn deep usage history into polished, data-backed bragging rights.

Generate role-driven cards with badges, proof metrics, and export-ready visuals.

personal · claude-max · live
work · codex-plus · saved
team · gemini-pro · ready
All-time analytics

One screen of signal, inside the Stats tab.

53-week GitHub-style heatmap, four overview metrics, trend chart, Top Projects ranked by cost, and model distribution — raw transcripts turned into readable signal.

Preview layout · last 12 months
Live totals from local history
Cost, tokens, sessions, and messages are calculated from your parsed transcripts
Activity · last 12 months
Illustrative heatmap · shows the 53-week layout

claude-opus-4 Preview split

cache read · cache write
Cache read / write and hit ratio are generated from real session data
Every tab · every signal

Six postcards — from the session list to the settings switches.

Each one strips the chrome and keeps the rhythm that tab is really about: folded sessions, color-coded transcript, hero number + sparkline, 28-day bars, three gauges, a row of switches.

▸ 12
▸ 8
▸ 5
▸ 3
session · grouped by project
01 · SESSIONS

Every session, folded by project.

Your transcripts from ~/.claude and ~/.codex, grouped by working directory. Model badge, token count, cost, live context %. ⌘F searches the whole archive with FTS snippets.

parse
transcript · tool calls classified
02 · TRANSCRIPT

Tool calls classified, searchable, readable.

User, Claude and each tool get their own color. Markdown renders. Code blocks highlight. Search jumps to every hit and stays there while you scroll.

Live totals
Built from your local history
CostSessionsProjects
stats · every signal
03 · STATS

Every number that matters, on one screen.

Tokens, cost, sessions, messages — aggregated across Claude, Codex and Gemini. Drill into any project for a dual-axis trend and model distribution.

today · the app shows real token totals and day-over-day change here
daily · 28-day rhythm
04 · DAILY

A 28-day rhythm, with today in magenta.

Bars for every day. Today's bar is magenta so you can't miss it. Details below show sessions, messages, tool calls and day-over-day delta.

5h 42% 3h 42m left
7d 38% 7d 23h left
7d Sonnet 72% 7d 23h left
usage · windows + resets
05 · USAGE

Subscription windows. Reset countdowns. Per provider.

Claude shows 5h / 7d / 7d-Sonnet. Codex shows 5h / 7d. Gemini tracks Pro, Flash, Flash-Lite. Green → amber → red tells you at a glance whether you'll hit the ceiling before reset.

Resume in Auto
Launch at login
Global shortcut⌃⌘S
Auto refresh5s10s30s
settings · every switch you want
06 · SETTINGS

Every switch a heavy user actually wants.

Resume in Auto, launch at login, global ⌃⌘S shortcut, auto-refresh cadence, language, font size, tab reordering. Sparkle auto-updates in the background.

Share preview

Turn heavy usage history into a polished identity card people will actually remember.

Share Preview is not a generic export. It composes role labels, badge unlocks, cost and token proof, project coverage, and a QR-ready layout into something worth posting.

ROLE · 01
Context Beast Tamer
Avg context > 75%
ROLE · 02
Efficient Operator
Best token/session ratio
ROLE · 03
Full-Stack Pathfinder
≥ 12 cross-project
ROLE · 04
Multi-Model Director
4+ models mixed
ROLE · 05
Night-Shift Engineer
> 40% late-night
ROLE · 06
Sprint Hacker
3+ seven-day bursts
ROLE · 07
Steady Builder
30 days in a row
ROLE · 08
Tool Summoner
> 65% tool-call rate
ROLE · 09
Vibe Coding King
200+ sessions / month
Unlockable badge system
Auto-unlocked from your real usage patterns · shapes illustrative, app ships the real icons.

Your AI identity is ready. Share it and see who else has a weirder prompt style.
Ready to ship

Download the app or inspect the source.

Install the latest DMG from GitHub Releases, or clone the repository and build it locally with XcodeGen and Xcode 16+.
